payload.title: BudgetWatch September 2021 Flash Report
payload.description: Finance Committee Meeting exhibit book reflecting preliminary operating results through August and subsidies received through September, with results measured against the Mid-Year Forecast.

evidence_refs.source_quote: This BudgetWatch reflects preliminary operating results through August and subsidies received through September, with results measured against the Mid-Year Forecast.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.
